account.usageUpdates: Usage updates after each tailored CV.
account.upgradeRoutine: Upgrade only when CV Studio becomes routine
account.noMonthlyCap: No monthly cap on CV tailoring

switcher.samePageFallback: If this page is not localized yet, you will land on the localized homepage.

index.title: jobmejob — Tailor Your CV to Any Job Description
index.description: Tailor your CV or resume to any job description, spot missing keywords, improve ATS match, and export a clean PDF you can send.

plan.title: jobmejob • CV Tailoring Plans & Pricing
plan.description: Compare CV Studio plans for CV tailoring, ATS match checks, missing keyword guidance, and export-ready PDFs.

signup.title: jobmejob | Start CV Tailoring with CV Studio
signup.description: Sign in with Google, upload your base CV once, and tailor your CV to any job description in CV Studio.

cvStudio.title: jobmejob CV Studio - Tailor Your CV to Any Job Description
cvStudio.description: Use CV Studio to tailor your CV to any job description, find missing keywords, improve ATS match, and export a polished PDF.

hero.eyebrow: Tailor your CV to any job description
hero.title: Tailor your CV to any job description.
hero.subtitle: Bring in a job post, tailor your CV or resume around the requirements, catch missing keywords, and export an ATS-friendly PDF.
hero.status: The extension only saves time when you import the job post. CV Studio is the CV tailoring tool behind the workflow: it maps your CV to the role, shows missing keywords, keeps the format ATS-friendly, and lets you export a clean PDF.

overview.title: What your tailored CV includes
overview.copy: One job description becomes one tailored CV draft you can review, edit, and export.
overview.card1Body: The draft is shaped around the role requirements while staying grounded in your real experience.
overview.card2Body: See what already matches, what is still missing, and what to add only if it is true for your background.
overview.card3Body: Keep the layout simple for ATS systems, refine the wording yourself, and export a clean PDF.

preview.title: See CV Studio before you start tailoring.
preview.desc: A real CV Studio screen shows how the job description, keyword guidance, and CV preview sit side by side while you edit.
preview.leftBody: Paste any job description or import it with the extension. The job, your CV, and the editing flow stay in one place.
preview.rightBody: See ATS match, covered terms, and missing keywords without losing the live CV preview.
preview.stripTitle: Edit the wording, add only true terms, and export when the CV feels right.

how.title: How to tailor your CV to a job description.
how.desc: Import the role, tailor your CV, make quick edits, and export the version you want to send.
how.step1Body: Paste any job description or import it with the Chrome extension. Either way, the same CV tailoring flow starts.
how.step2Title: Tailor your CV to the role
how.step2Body: CV Studio updates the CV around the job requirements, highlights ATS keywords, and shows which priority terms are already covered.
how.step3Body: Refine bullets, experience, skills, or profile, add only true missing terms, then export a clean PDF.
how.calloutTitle: You stay in control of the final CV
how.calloutBody: Review the draft, change anything, and export only when the tailored version feels right.

pricing.title: Start free.
pricing.desc: Simple monthly pricing for CV Studio. Prices are shown in your local currency when available.
pricing.freeLead: Good if you want to test it.
pricing.freeValueTitle: Use it on real job posts
pricing.freeValueBody: Import with Chrome or paste the text
pricing.freeFeature1: Import with Chrome or paste any job post
pricing.freeFeature2: ATS score and missing keyword guidance
pricing.freeFeature3: Edit bullets, experience, skills, and profile
pricing.starterValueBody: One monthly quota for extension and manual paste
pricing.starterFeature2: Good for applying to several jobs each week
pricing.starterFeature3: Keep working from one base CV
pricing.plusLead: For broader, heavier, or multi-role search volume.
pricing.plusValueBody: One higher monthly quota across extension and manual paste.
pricing.plusFeature2: Best for broader weekly application volume
pricing.plusFeature3: More room across multiple roles or markets
pricing.plusFeature4: Simple monthly plan with the highest CV quota
pricing.autoValueBody: We will launch it separately when it is ready.
pricing.autoFeature2: Market coverage will be announced clearly
pricing.autoFeature3: More guided setup when it launches
pricing.autoFeature4: Request access instead of self-serve checkout
pricing.fineprint: Your price can change by country. Free, Starter, and Plus all share the same CV Studio workflow.

contact.title: Need help?
contact.body: Tell us what kind of job you want and we’ll point you to the best setup.
contact.name: Name

ats.title: Check ATS match score and missing keywords.
ats.desc: Each tailored CV includes an ATS match score and keyword gap list so you can see what to improve before you apply.
ats.cardTitle: What the ATS match score checks
ats.cardBody: We compare the job post with your CV and check whether the main requirements are easy to find in a simple, ATS-friendly format.
ats.bullet1Body: skills, tools, and tasks that appear in your CV.
ats.bullet2Body: must-have terms count more than nice-to-have terms.
ats.bullet3Body: clear section titles and easy-to-read structure.
ats.bullet4Body: we show missing terms only when they could fit your real experience.
ats.note: The score is a guide. It cannot promise an interview.
ats.footerNote: The score guides the tailoring. It does not invent experience.

why.title: Why this helps you apply with a stronger CV.
why.desc: The value is clearer role fit, visible keyword gaps, and more control over the final document you send.
why.item1Title: Go from job description to first draft faster
why.item1Body: Bring in any role and get a tailored starting point without rebuilding your CV from scratch.
why.item2Body: You can spot missing keywords before you apply.
why.item3Body: Change bullet points, experience, skills, and profile inside the app.
why.item4Body: Keep the structure ATS-friendly and export a PDF when the tailored version looks right.
why.principleBody: We help you tailor the CV, but the final document should stay true, clear, and easy to read.

faq.title: Questions about CV tailoring.
faq.desc: If you are not sure whether it fits your job search, send us a note.
faq.q1: Can I tailor my CV from any website?
faq.a1: Yes. Paste any job description, or import the page with the Chrome extension.
faq.q2: Does CV Studio invent experience or details?
faq.a2: No. The CV should stay true to your real experience. We only suggest changes that could fit your background.
faq.q3: Can I edit the tailored CV before export?
faq.a3: Yes. You can change bullet points, experience, skills, and profile before you export the PDF.
faq.q4: What does the ATS match score mean?
faq.a4: It shows how well your CV lines up with one job post. It is helpful guidance, not a promise of an interview.
faq.q5: Do I need to rewrite my whole CV each time?
faq.a5: No. Your base CV stays saved, and each role gets its own tailored version.

footer.tagline: CV tailoring for real job descriptions.

signup.heroTitle: Start tailoring your CV with CV Studio.
signup.heroSub: Sign in with Google, upload your base CV once, and tailor your CV to any job description right away. The Chrome extension handles one-click imports, and manual paste stays available anytime.
signup.hint: You stay in control. CV Studio tailors the draft around the job description, and nothing is sent without your confirmation.
signup.workflowNote: After sign-in, we’ll take you to CV upload first. Once your base CV is in place, you can tailor your CV for any job description from the website or extension.
signup.step1Body: This website handles the account, billing, and stored base CV. The extension only imports the job page.
signup.step2Body: We keep this as your source of truth so every tailored version stays grounded in your real experience.
signup.step3Body: Once your base CV is in place, use the extension or manual paste to send a job description into CV Studio and tailor the next version.
signup.redirectNote: If sign-in loops: Supabase Auth settings must allow this page URL as a redirect URL.

cvStudio.heroTitle: Tailor your CV to any job description.
cvStudio.heroBody: Paste a full job description or import it from LinkedIn and other job boards. CV Studio keeps your real experience, improves ATS match, and turns the role into a tailored CV in minutes.
cvStudio.heroNoteBody: Add it on the Chrome Web Store, or paste manually whenever you want a fallback. It uses the same jobmejob account and does not need a separate login inside the side panel.
cvStudio.summaryTitle: Built to tailor a CV from real job descriptions
cvStudio.summaryBody: CV Studio is the core product inside jobmejob. It helps you tailor your CV, check ATS keywords, and export a clean version for each role.
cvStudio.summaryStep1Title: Bring in the full job description
cvStudio.summaryStep1Body: Scrape from the current tab or paste the full posting yourself.
cvStudio.summaryStep2Body: Upload once, then tailor role by role without redoing setup every time.
cvStudio.summaryStep3Body: See matched keywords, missing terms, and export the tailored CV right away.
cvStudio.workflowTitle: Use manual paste or import straight from the extension.
cvStudio.workflowBody: Both paths lead into the same CV tailoring workflow. The extension is faster on supported job pages, and manual paste works whenever you need it.
cvStudio.flow1Body: Create your CV Studio account on the website so your usage, billing, and stored base CV stay in one place.
cvStudio.flow2Body: Google sign-in and CV upload happen on jobmejob. This is where your account, usage, and stored CV live.
cvStudio.flow3Body: Use the extension on supported job pages or paste the role manually. Both send the job description into the same CV Studio flow you already use on jobmejob.
cvStudio.manualBody: Sign in, upload your base CV, and paste any job description whenever you want to tailor a new version. The extension simply speeds up that import step.
cvStudio.heroPricingTitle: Start free. Upgrade only when CV tailoring becomes part of your weekly routine.
cvStudio.heroPricingBody: CV Studio pricing is separate from Auto-apply. The extension and pasted job descriptions both use the same CV Studio quota.
cvStudio.pricingFreeFeature3: ATS match score and missing keyword suggestions
cvStudio.pricingStarterFeature2: Extension imports and manual paste jobs
cvStudio.pricingStarterFeature3: Great for focused searches across a few roles
cvStudio.pricingPlusFeature2: Best if you tailor across many roles or markets
cvStudio.autoApplyBody: Auto-apply is the higher-touch product. It depends on market coverage, job quality, and email sending workflows, so it should stay request-based while CV Studio scales globally.
cvStudio.autoApplyPoint1: Position it as a guided beta, not a default plan
cvStudio.autoApplyPoint2: Best for users who also want job sourcing and outbound help
cvStudio.autoApplyPoint3: Say clearly which markets are supported today
cvStudio.storyBody: New users can understand jobmejob in one sentence: tailor your CV to a job description, then decide later if you also want help with job sourcing and applications.
cvStudio.storyNote: That keeps the extension global, the pricing simpler, and the market-specific automation product honest.

plan.heroTitle: Start free. Upgrade when CV tailoring becomes part of your weekly search.
plan.heroSub: Use one monthly CV quota across the Chrome extension and pasted job descriptions. CV Studio keeps CV tailoring simple to buy and easy to understand. Auto-apply remains a separate, request-only beta for users who need more than tailoring.
plan.heroSupport: Best for job seekers who want a clearer CV tailoring workflow first and only need sourcing or Auto-apply later.
plan.bullet1Body: CV Studio works with pasted job descriptions and the Chrome extension, so you can tailor your CV even when one-click importing is not available.
plan.bullet2Body: You pay for a monthly CV quota, not for a complicated bundle of automations you may not need yet.
plan.bullet3Body: Start with tailoring first, then request the higher-touch Auto-apply beta only if you want sourcing and outbound help too.
plan.upgradeIntro: Pick the monthly quota that matches your search volume. If checkout is live you go straight into billing. If a billing path is still being finalized, you still get a guided fallback instead of a dead end.
plan.billingSummary: Paid CV Studio plans open in Stripe checkout. Signed-in customers can later manage or cancel in the billing portal.
plan.nextStep1: A clear start with no commitment
plan.nextStep2: A paid plan that matches real application volume
plan.nextStep3: A separate path for Auto-apply instead of hidden complexity
plan.plansIntro: Choose the quota that matches how often you tailor your CV. The extension and the paste flow use the same monthly CV Studio allowance.
plan.freeLead: Validate the workflow before you pay.
plan.freeQuotaBody: Enough to test the extension, the pasted job flow, and your first applications.
plan.freeBestForBody: trying the product before it becomes part of your weekly routine.
plan.freeFeature2: ATS match score and keyword gaps
plan.starterLead: For active weekly applications across a few target roles.
plan.starterQuotaBody: A lightweight paid tier for a normal active search without overbuying usage.
plan.starterBestForBody: focused job searches where tailoring quality matters more than brute-force volume.
plan.plusLead: For broader, heavier, or multi-role search volume.
plan.plusQuotaBody: Enough room for broader search volume while staying inside one simple monthly plan.
plan.plusBestForBody: multi-role or multi-market searches where you tailor often and do not want the quota to be the bottleneck.
plan.plusFeature3: Useful when you tailor across several role clusters
plan.checkoutNote: Free includes 5 tailored CVs. Paid plans are monthly and use one shared quota across extension and manual paste mode.
plan.workflowTitle: One CV tailoring workflow, different usage levels
plan.workflowPoint1: One quota covers both Chrome extension imports and pasted job descriptions
plan.workflowPoint2: Start free, then upgrade only when CV Studio becomes part of your real routine
plan.workflowPoint3: Keep using the same stored base CV and tailoring flow as you move up plans
plan.workflowPoint4: Auto-apply stays separate so pricing remains simple and globally usable
plan.faq1Body: Each successful tailored CV generation counts once, whether it starts from the extension or from pasted job text.
plan.faq2Title: Do I need Auto-apply to use CV Studio?
plan.faq2Body: No. CV Studio is the main product. Auto-apply is optional and handled separately for users who want more than tailoring.
plan.faq3Title: What if self-serve billing is still being finalized?
plan.faq3Body: You still get a guided fallback, so you can signal buying intent and get help instead of hitting a dead end.
plan.requestTitle: Add Auto-apply only if you need more than CV tailoring
plan.requestBody: Auto-apply is a guided beta for users who also want sourcing and outbound support. Keeping it separate makes the main product simpler, more honest, and easier to buy.
plan.whoBody: Request Auto-apply if you already know you want help beyond tailoring and you are comfortable with a more guided, higher-touch setup.
plan.whoPoint1: CV Studio already works without job fetching
plan.whoPoint2: Auto-apply depends on sourcing quality and market support
plan.whoPoint3: The higher-touch product starts with a request flow on purpose

dynamic.createAccountWhenUpgrade: Create an account when you want to upgrade
dynamic.billingSummaryLive: Paid CV Studio plans open in secure checkout. Signed-in customers can manage or cancel later in the billing portal.
dynamic.checkoutNoteLive: Starter and Plus are monthly CV Studio plans with one shared quota across extension and paste mode.
dynamic.billingSummaryPartial: Checkout is available for paid CV Studio plans. If a specific billing action is not self-serve yet, the page falls back to direct support.
dynamic.checkoutNotePartial: Paid plans are monthly. If a billing action is still being finalized, you still get a guided support path.
dynamic.billingSummaryFallback: Pricing is live, but direct checkout is still being finalized. Paid plan buttons currently route into a guided billing request.
dynamic.checkoutNoteFallback: If checkout is not live yet, you can still request access and get a response instead of losing your place.
dynamic.checkoutCancelledNote: Checkout was cancelled. You can retry any time or stay on the free plan.
dynamic.heroTitleSignedIn: {plan} unlocked. Start tailoring your next CV now.
dynamic.heroTitleSignedOut: Payment received. Sign in to start using {plan}.
dynamic.heroSubActive: Your paid CV Studio plan is active, so you can move straight from checkout into tailoring.
dynamic.heroSubSyncing: Your payment went through. We are finishing the plan sync now so your quota is ready across CV Studio and the extension.
dynamic.heroSubSignedOut: Your payment went through. Sign back into the same jobmejob account so we can attach the purchase and open CV Studio.
dynamic.heroSupportActive: {detail}. Your stored base CV and the tailoring flow stay exactly the same.
dynamic.heroSupportSyncing: This usually finishes in a moment. If the quota still looks stale, open CV Studio once and we will refresh it there too.
dynamic.heroSupportSignedOut: Use the same email you just paid with so the subscription lands on the right account.
dynamic.upgradeIntroSignedIn: We turned your checkout into a ready-to-use CV Studio account so the next click can be tailoring, not more pricing.
dynamic.upgradeIntroSignedOut: Your checkout is complete. Sign back into jobmejob with the purchased account to unlock the paid quota.
dynamic.billingSummarySignedInActive: {remaining} this cycle. Open CV Studio to tailor against a job description right away.
dynamic.billingSummarySignedInSyncing: Checkout succeeded. We are finishing the plan sync now so your paid quota appears correctly.
dynamic.billingSummarySignedOut: Sign in with the purchased account to attach this checkout and start tailoring.
dynamic.nextStepsNoteSignedIn: You can manage or cancel later in the Stripe billing portal.
dynamic.nextStepsNoteSignedOut: Once you sign in, your paid plan will open directly into CV Studio.
dynamic.checkoutNoteSynced: {plan} is active. Go straight into CV Studio and generate your next tailored CV.
dynamic.checkoutNoteSyncing: Payment confirmed. We are syncing your paid plan now so your quota is ready.
dynamic.supportBody:
Hi jobmejob team,

I would like help activating the {plan} CV Studio plan.

Thanks.
dynamic.portalSupportBody:
Hi jobmejob team,

I need help with billing for my CV Studio subscription.

Thanks.
dynamic.requestFlow1: Open CV Studio and paste a job description or import one from the extension.
dynamic.requestFlow2: Generate your first tailored CV with your paid quota.
dynamic.requestFlow3: Come back here later only if you want to manage billing or compare plans.
dynamic.requestFlow4: Sign in with the same email used during checkout.
dynamic.requestFlow5: Open CV Studio and tailor your first job application.
dynamic.requestFlow6: Manage billing later from your account menu.

shared.doneRedirect: Done. Taking you to the next step…
shared.retryHint: Could not finish setup. Click again to retry.
